annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under Mont. Code Ann. § 25-9-205, currently 9.75% (as of January 1, 2026). Rate = (bank prime loan rate published in the Federal Reserve System's H.15 "Selected Interest Rates" release, or any superseding publication, on the day judgment is entered)… Simple interest. For a judgment involving a contractual obligation that specifies an interest rate, post-judgment interest is paid at the rate specified in the… Verify the current value at mca.legmt.gov; not legal advice.
